summary:
There is no evidence indicating that GRG5 functions only in late development; in fact, GRG5 is not mentioned anywhere in the provided developmental gene literature despite numerous referenced genes governing early and mid-development.\boxed{B}

The summary correctly reflects the core clinical point — absence of documented roles for GRG5 during any stage of development — directly addressing whether it acts exclusively in later phases without overreaching into speculation.
